briefdescription.para: offset for each dimension, all indexing calculations use this
offset for each dimension, all indexing calculations use this
set the underlying memory buffer - use with caution!

detaileddescription.para: Provide pointer and dimensions specified as arguments
Provide pointer and dimensions array specified as arguments. sizes must contain NumDims values.

Accessing data this way will be safe (indices are checked) and convenient, but not maximally efficient (unless the compiler is really good). Use operator() for fastest (but unchecked) access or access data directly.

briefdescription.para: Return memory address of specified index.

detaileddescription.para: Sizes should be the same, but will narrow as necessary. Will copy across device/host.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Grid< Dtype, NumDims+1, isCUDA > &G, size_t i)
memberdef.name: Grid

detaileddescription.para: A dense array of memory. The memory is owned and managed external to this class. The isCUDA template parameter is kept for API compatibility; on Apple Silicon all memory is unified and accessible from both CPU and GPU.
